category_sources: source_facts.description says TCP traffic analyzer; official yconalyzer site describes monitoring and analyzing TCP connections on a particular TCP port.
display_name_sources: Official documentation names the tool 'Yconalyzer'; source_facts.name is yconalyzer.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project links to the TCP Traffic Analyzer website, which contains introduction, usage examples, FAQ, and options documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge project and website provide downloads/documentation but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official yconalyzer website describe TCP connection analysis, capture/analyze modes, pcap compatibility, and command-line use.
